flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Central Piedmont Community College rose 13% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.0k → $7.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Central Piedmont Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Central Piedmont Community College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (56.9% → 69.9%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Central Piedmont Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (13.4k → 15.1k).
